description: Oh, sir, I am so sorry to bother you, but Edgelord stepped aside for this one. Three cards in the corpus — Phyrexian Ironworks (MH3-130), Wurmcoil Larva (MH3-112), Phyrexian Rager (MBC-62) — all canonically depict the Phyrexia faction, and the threshold for a faction-collective Mr. Nodeley node is met (3+, per the Bolas / orzhov-syndicate / team-rocket precedents). The faction is also already cross-referenced inside the Tamiyo node body (her compleation arc, her species classification as 'Phyrexian-compleated planeswalker'), so the node retroactively cleans up an implicit reference into an explicit graph edge. I really do think it will be useful, sir, if you don't mind. Future bundle work on body-horror-as-infrastructure or biology-as-raw-material will anchor here cleanly.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Praetors (Elesh Norn, Sheoldred, Vorinclex, Jin-Gitaxias, Urabrask)]
[Wizards: Phyrexia: All Will Be One design articles, Rosewater 2023]
[Wizards: March of the Machine story archive]

quad_slot_dispositions.E1_fear_of_abduction_cohort_extension: VERIFIED — node already updated by prior pass. DSK-9 in appears_on, Fear of Abduction in 'Cards in our corpus' body section, 5/10 cohort count reflected in caveats. No-op for Edgelord.
quad_slot_dispositions.E2_phyrexia_cluster_scan: EXECUTED — this proposal. 3 cards qualify; node created; cards pointered; Tamiyo cross-linked.
quad_slot_dispositions.E3_ral_and_implicit_maze: DEFERRED — Option C+D hybrid. Solo Ral card, no second Ral or third Izzet card in corpus yet. Character-to-character edges to Jace/Tamiyo/Bolas are deferred per the explicit 'character-to-character edge category not yet formalized' caveats in both Jace and Tamiyo nodes. Re-evaluate when (a) a 2nd Ral card lands for solo-node candidacy, (b) ≥3 Izzet-watermark cards land for izzet-league node candidacy, or (c) the character-to-character edge category is formalized as a graph dimension.
quad_slot_dispositions.E4_survivor_cycle_nodeley: DEFERRED — only 2 mechanically-typed Survivor corpus cards (Cautious Survivor DSK-172, Glimmer Seeker DSK-14) carry the canonical Survival keyword and Survivor creature type. Norin Swift Survivalist (DSK-297) is a flavor-survivor only, not a mechanical Survivor-typed card. Threshold ≥3 not met. Re-evaluate when a third Survival-mechanic card enters the corpus.

other_candidates_considered: MH3 Phyrexian sub-cycle node (Ironworks + Wurmcoil Larva as MH3-specific Phyrexia reprints) — rejected; weaker than the faction-level Phyrexia node which absorbs the same two cards plus the MBC reprint and accommodates the entire future Phyrexian corpus accumulation.

Foundations dragon cluster (FDN-84 Dragon Trainer + FDN-86 Fiery Annihilation + MH3-121 Furnace Hellkite) — examined and deferred. Three dragon cards exist but lack designer-coordinated faction-collective canon (dragons are a creature type with intra-faction variance across guilds and planes, not a faction). A 'dragon' hub would belong to Alex's hand-curation queue per the bbl-hubs-hand-curated rule.

Duskmourn haunted-house cluster (Unwilling Vessel + Scrabbling Skullcrab + Unnerving Grasp + Stay Hidden Stay Silent) — examined; DSK is already heavily-noded with fear-of-cycle and dsk-unlucky-lands-cycle. Over-saturation risk. Defer to janitor_triage for set-level diff.
